title: socat bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[1.7.4.1-8]
- Fix for: Client may exit 0 despite connection being reset
  Resolves: RHEL-107884

[1.7.4.1-7]
- add fix for CVE-2024-54661
  Resolves: RHEL-94843
- switch to autopatch, remove unused patches
full_text:
[1.7.4.1-8]
- Fix for: Client may exit 0 despite connection being reset
  Resolves: RHEL-107884

[1.7.4.1-7]
- add fix for CVE-2024-54661
  Resolves: RHEL-94843
- switch to autopatch, remove unused patches

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20820.html
